title: Request Logging Middleware
description: Add a RequestLoggingMiddleware class to src/agentauth/api/middleware.py and wire it into the FastAPI middleware stack in main.py. On each request, log: method, path, status_code, duration_ms, client_ip, request_id, agent_id (if authenticated), and user_agent. Generate request_id from the X-Request-ID header or auto-generate a UUID4 if absent. Bind request_id to structlog context so all downstream log entries include it. Set X-Request-ID on the response header. Implement 404 noise filtering: if status is 404 and the path did not match any registered FastAPI route, log at DEBUG level; if it matched a route but the resource wasn't found, log at WARNING. Skip logging entirely for /health and /ready endpoints to avoid liveness probe noise.
validation: Middleware is registered in main.py middleware stack
Logs include method, path, status_code, duration_ms, client_ip, request_id, agent_id, user_agent
request_id sourced from X-Request-ID header or auto-generated UUID4
request_id bound to structlog context for all downstream logs
X-Request-ID response header is set on every response
404 on unregistered routes logged at DEBUG (not WARNING/ERROR)
404 on registered routes (resource not found) logged at WARNING
